title: Numbered lines/tasks
excerpt: Sorry if this has come up multiple times before, but are there any plans to assign sequential numbers to tasks similar to traditional gantt charts? It would make tying dependencies together so much easier and also help f…

posts.author: mmatisa (Michael Matisa)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry if this has come up multiple times before, but are there any plans to assign sequential numbers to tasks similar to traditional gantt charts? It would make tying dependencies together so much easier and also help faciliate discussions while screen sharing to be able to quickly say “look at task #23” as an example.
